race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before BOG At Cheltenham Maiden Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner way of stars (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Gnomon with 38.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Gnomon > Way Of Stars, but actual result was Way Of Stars (IRE) > Gnomon. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
